chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Customs Reference Appl. No.879 of 2017 Collector of Customs Versus M/s Real Impacts, Lahore Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection No.21. 2. For orders on CMA 3673/17 3. For hearing of main case 4. For orders on CMA 3674/17 Dated: 08.12.2021 Mr. Khalil Dogar for applicant. -.-.- Learned counsel for the applicant submits that the questions raised by the applicant in this Reference is identical to those which were heard and decided earlier in Reference Application No.239 of 2014, hence this Reference is also hit by the conclusion drawn in the referred reference application. Copy of the order is filed by the learned counsel which is taken on record. In view of the above and as requested by the learned counsel, instant Special Customs Reference Application, along with listed applications, is dismissed with the same reasoning and rational and also the conclusion drawn in the above referred reference application which shall apply mutatis mutandis in the instant matter as well. Judge Judge
